title: Better Hot Bar
description: A simple, clean hotbar replacement that makes your numbered slots easier to read at a glance. No more squinting — just crisp, clear numbers 1–9 for a better gameplay experience.
body:
Better Hot Bar is a tiny but mighty resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default hotbar numbers (1–9) with cleaner, bolder, and more legible digits.

No more squinting at fuzzy or skinny numbers — just a crisp, readable hotbar that keeps the vanilla charm intact.

✨ Features

Clear, bold digits – Each number (1 through 9) is redesigned for instant recognition.

Vanilla‑friendly – Matches Minecraft’s default UI style, so it doesn’t look out of place.

Lightweight – Only changes the hotbar number textures; zero performance impact.

Wide compatibility – Works with most other resource packs (load Better Hot Bar above them if numbers conflict).

Perfect for – PvP, speedrunning, building, streaming, or just everyday play.

📦 Installation

Download the .zip file (do not unzip it).

Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs.

Click “Open Pack Folder” and drag the .zip file in.

Enable Better Hot Bar from the left panel and move it to the right.

(Optional) Place it above other UI‑changing packs for the best result.

Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition (any version that supports resource packs – 1.6+).

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Does this work with OptiFine or Fabric/Forge?
A: Yes – it’s a pure resource pack and works with any mod loader or optimization mod.

Q: Will it change the selected hotbar slot highlight?
A: No – only the numbers. The slot background and highlight remain unchanged.

Q: Can I use this with other number‑changing packs?
A: You can, but load Better Hot Bar above them if you want these numbers to take priority.

🔧 Support

Found an issue or have a suggestion? Leave a comment on the CurseForge page.

**_Better Hot Bar – small change, big difference._**
